problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: The key to Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? is Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating — specifically Atomic layer deposition — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
